notes:
I was unable to launch the game using the latest Proton @ 8.0-3 or Experimental at the time, and I wasn't able either to use older versions of Proton per reports here to load the game.

On each of five different Proton versions from 5.0-x to current, the game would launch, a small beige loading window would appear, and then the game would crash and stop.

I appear up-to-date on GPU drivers, and WineHQ as of this post appears to have nothing on the game with respect to workarounds, and I'm not savvy enough to figure this out on my own.

I was looking forward to playing this game... Oh well.
Worked totally fine out of the box for me.
